name: Contact Hit
description: Any card with Contact 7+. Small reliable runs.

name: Speed Steal
description: A Speed 7+ card alongside a Discipline 7+ or Contact 8+ card.

name: Full Outfield
description: LF + CF + RF in one play.

name: Battery
description: P + C in one play. Also cancels pitch penalties.

name: Lefty Advantage
description: Left or switch batters vs a right-handed pitch.

name: Veteran Presence
description: 2+ Vintage cards: their total Discipline is added to base.
